scenes.text: AI video agents hide the mess. This one shows every file.
scenes.visualDirection: A black-box cube breaks open inside a code-native 3D runner track.

scenes.text: Script JSON, audio WAV, captions, and validate JSON all become inspectable pipeline objects.
scenes.visualDirection: Generated artifacts fly down the runner track as labeled low-poly objects.

scenes.text: The validate gate rejects junk before a demo is promoted, while the 3D layer stays code-native.
scenes.visualDirection: A red validation gate appears, followed by a green pipeline-passed portal.

scenes.text: No stolen gameplay, no watermarks, and no external music: the preview ships with an asset ledger.
scenes.visualDirection: Rights-safe labels, audit badges, and a provenance ledger object move through the runner world.

scenes.text: Star it, run doctor, then build a short you can debug.
scenes.visualDirection: End card with the GitHub repository and a concise open-source CTA.

reasoning: Manual script artifact for the code-native 3D/procedural demo. The tracked MP4 is generated by deterministic JavaScript and ffmpeg without external models, textures, gameplay footage, music, or API calls.
